# beatLabs

> Dubai-based digital studio building independent brands — apps, agencies, and creative platforms.

beatLabs is the studio behind a portfolio of independent digital brands. Each brand operates autonomously with its own identity, audience, and business model.

## Brands

- [Nibango](https://nibango.com/uiapp/) — Peer-to-peer second-hand marketplace for the Gulf. In development.
- [WebVanguard](https://webvanguard.co) — Web design agency for businesses in Dubai and the UAE.
- [TrueLoveCreative](https://truelovecreative.es) — Brand identity and creative studio.
- [Estrela.photo](https://estrela.photo) — Artist portrait photography.

## Contact

- Email: info@beatlabs.ae
- Location: Dubai, UAE
- Founded: 2026
